creator: kuriyama@FreeBSD.org
text:
2010/5/13 Philip M. Gollucci <pgollucci@freebsd.org>:
 > Bring port dirs/names into 'standards'
 > www/mod_extract_forwarded -> www/mod_extract_forwarded2
 > www/mod_extract_forwarded_ap13 -> www/mod_extract_forwarded
 >
 > These are 'repo' moves not copies (both destinations exist already in other states)
 
 Yes, they are non-standard names.  But we already have
 mod_extract_forwarded2 port, which is
 forked from old mod_extract_forwarded and have different codeset.
 
 What should we do with this situation?
 
 
 -- 
 Jun Kuriyama <kuriyama@FreeBSD.org> // FreeBSD Project
          <kuriyama@s2factory.co.jp> // S2 Factory, Inc.
